LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT GATEWAY BANK F.S.B.'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS GRANTED. MR. COOK'S REPRESENTATION OF DEFENDANT IN AN UNDERLYING ACTION THAT IS THE SUBJECT OF THIS FEE DISPUTE ACTION IS SUBSTANTIALLY RELATED TO THE MATTER TO WHICH HE SEEKS TO REPRESENT ADVERSE TO DEFENDANT. MR. COOK IS POSSESSED OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION THAT WOULD IMPACT THE PRESENT MATTER. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT THE BASF ARBITRATION IS STAYED 45 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

Ntc Of Mtn To Vacate Stay In Part And Pos
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul B. Gruwell, Esq. of Hanson Bridgett, Tel. 415.995.5834, for defendant and moving party;
David J. Cook, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GATEWAY BANK F.S.B.'S Motion To Vacate Stay In Part is Granted. The stay is vacated in part as the court finds that the motion to disqualify is not appropriate for arbitration under Business & Professions Code 6200, et seq. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

Mtn To Disqualify; Appendix
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul B. Gruwell, Esq. of Hanson Bridgett, Tel. 415.995.5834, for defendant and moving party;
David J. Cook, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GATEWAY BANK F.S.B.'S Motion To Disqualify Plaintiff's Counsel is Granted. Mr. Cook's representation of Defendant in an underlying action that is the subject of this fee dispute action is substantially related to the matter to which he seeks to represent adverse to Defendant. Mr. Cook is possessed of confidential information that would impact the present matter. The court further orders that the BASF Arbitration is stayed 45 days. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition And And Petition To Compel Arb
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul B. Gruwell, Esq. of Hanson Bridgett, Tel. 415.995.5834, for defendant and moving party;
David J. Cook, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GATEWAY BANK F.S.B. Petition To Compel Arbitration is Off calendar. Defendant has elected to arbitrate this fee dispute before the Bar Association of San Francisco. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
